title: Personal Portfolio Site
description: End-to-end design and development of this personal portfolio. Built with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. Deployed via GitHub + Vercel CI/CD pipeline.

title: Learning Copilot
description: Desktop AI learning app (Windows 11) that positions the AI as a personal tutor orchestrating study over time — a guided workflow, not a chatbot. Covers topic-based and materials-based learning paths, embedded knowledge checks, spaced repetition, and a collapsible tutor sidebar central to the experience.
